project: Stock Prediction Platform — Full System Audit & Examination
description: Comprehensive 100-story audit loop. Tests every feature via Playwright MCP (frontend + Grafana), scans all code for stale/dead artifacts, implements improvements, and researches technology integrations. Final output: SYSTEM-EXAMINATION.md with 3 sections — (1) Stale Code & Fixes, (2) System Improvements, (3) Technology Integration Recommendations.

userStories.title: Initialize audit infrastructure and port-forward all services
userStories.description: Set up .audit/ directory with section files, verify all port-forwards are live, record baseline K8s pod status.
acceptanceCriteria: Create .audit/ directory at repo root with files: 01-stale-code.md, 02-improvements.md, 03-tech-integration.md — each with a markdown header and 'Status: IN PROGRESS' line
Run: kubectl get pods -A --no-headers | awk '{print $1,$2,$4}' — record which pods are Running/CrashLoop/Pending in .audit/01-stale-code.md under '## K8s Pod Baseline'

Verify port-forwards: curl -s http://localhost:8010/health | head -5 (API), curl -s http://localhost:9090/-/ready (Prometheus), curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/health (Grafana) — document which are up
If Grafana port-forward missing: kubectl port-forward svc/grafana -n monitoring 3000:3000 &
If Prometheus port-forward missing: kubectl port-forward svc/prometheus -n monitoring 9090:9090 &
Record findings in .audit/01-stale-code.md under '## Service Connectivity Baseline'
Commit: 'audit: [US-001] initialize .audit infrastructure and verify service connectivity'
